title: How to design a multi-agent system that skips the LLM
summary: Google Cloud Tech demonstrates Race Condition, a 1000-agent marathon planning system that skips LLM calls for deterministic tasks like route optimization. The key architectural pattern uses a before_model_callback to route agents to deterministic code (Spine & Sprout algorithm) instead of calling the LLM, reducing token usage and latency while maintaining agent-based orchestration.
